headline: 1 Nasdaq 100 Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Question
summary: The Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is home to some of the biggest success stories in tech and growth investing. However, certain stocks in the index face challenges like profitability concerns, rising costs, or shifts in market trends.

headline: Collect 9.8% On VRTX Stock Now, And Still Keep 15% Of Upside
summary: Get paid a guaranteed income on your Vertex shares today, which you keep no matter what, for agreeing to sell them at a higher price if the stock keeps climbing.

headline: Vortex Energy Provides Corporate Update on Robinsons River Salt Project Technical Study
